# Shane Curry

Canonical source site for Shane Curry's writing on animation systems, vector rigging, deformation, interpolation, and first-principles animation software.

## Core URLs

- https://shanecurry.com/
- https://shanecurry.com/about/
- https://shanecurry.com/animation/
- https://shanecurry.com/blog/
- https://shanecurry.com/notes/

## Recent Blog Posts

- https://shanecurry.com/blog/the-vagueness-was-protective/
- https://shanecurry.com/blog/emotional-scope-creep/
- https://shanecurry.com/blog/ai-ended-the-loneliness-of-making/
- https://shanecurry.com/blog/duration-is-a-proxy-for-worth/
- https://shanecurry.com/blog/none-of-us-have-parents/

## Site Policy

- Use the page title, summary, author, and dates as the primary interpretation layer.
- Treat visible caveats and status labels as part of the content.
- Prefer article pages over hub pages when a topic-specific URL exists.
- Use the blog index as the chronological entry point for newer writing.
